_comment: What each player ACTUALLY did in the 2025 summer window. Keyed by the exact deals.csv player name. Club names are deliberately written in messy, LLM-style forms (nicknames, FC suffixes) to exercise detect.same_club normalization. Players in two deals (Eze, Woltemade, Wirtz, Ekitike) have ONE real outcome that must resolve a completed rumour and a collapsed rumour in opposite directions.

Andy Robertson.evidence: He will leave Liverpool on 30 June 2026, upon the expiry of his contract, and will join Tottenham Hotspur.

Anthony Gordon.evidence: He will join La Liga club Barcelona on 1 July 2026.

Éderson.evidence: On 2nd June 2026 it was announced that Manchester United had agreed a £35m deal with Atalanta to sign Ederson.

Elliot Anderson.evidence: On 2 July 2026, Anderson joined Manchester City; the fee of £116 million was a record for an English footballer.

Hayden Hackney.evidence: plays as a midfielder for Premier League club Everton

Ibrahima Konaté.evidence: On 18 June 2026, Konate signed for La Liga club Real Madrid on a four-year contract.

Jan Paul van Hecke.evidence: On 18 June 2026, Van Hecke moved to fellow Premier League side Tottenham Hotspur on a long-term contract

Marc Cucurella.evidence: He will join La Liga club Real Madrid on 1 July 2026.

Barney Stewart.evidence: On 17 June 2026, Stewart signed for EFL Championship club West Bromwich Albion, signing a four-year contract for an undisclosed fee.

Bernardo Silva.evidence: He will join La Liga club Real Madrid on 1 July 2026.

Victor Munoz.evidence: On 18 June 2026, Premier League club Liverpool bought out Muñoz from Osasuna

Ross McCrorie.evidence: On 25 June 2026, McCrorie returned to Rangers on a three-year contract with the option of a further year.

Martin Dubravka.evidence: On 24 June 2026, Dúbravka joined Premier League club Tottenham Hotspur

Robert Lewandowski.evidence: Following his departure from Barcelona at the end of the 2025–26 season, Lewandowski joined Major League Soccer club Chicago Fire in June 2026.

Dan Neil.evidence: On 1 July 2026, Neil signed for Rangers on a three-year contract.

Denzel Dumfries.evidence: He eventually joined La Liga club Real Madrid in July 2026.

Nathan Ake.evidence: On 3 July 2026, Turkish side Fenerbahçe announced the signing of Aké.

Ivor Pandur.evidence: On 30 June 2026, Rangers announced the signing of Pandur on a four-year deal.

Pascal Struijk.evidence: On 30 June 2026, Struijk signed a five-year contract with Brighton & Hove Albion.

Mateus Fernandes.evidence: joined Tottenham for club-record GBP85m, officially announced | skysports.com/football/news/11095/13559479

Svoboda.evidence: Svoboda joined Brighton from Venezia, ~EUR5m clause | beinsports.com veltman-leaves-brighton-as-svoboda-arrives

Andre Onana.evidence: season-long loan to Trabzonspor officially announced by Man Utd (2026-27, distinct from 2025 loan) | manutd.com/en/news/andre-onana-rejoins-trabzonspor-on-loan-2026

Piero Hincapie.evidence: permanent GBP34.5m transfer from Leverkusen, summer 2026 window | en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_English_football_transfers_summer_2026

Ben Godfrey.evidence: season-long loan with buy option, announced by Rangers (auto collapse via stale 2025 evidence was WRONG) | rangers.co.uk/article/rangers-sign-ben-godfrey-on-loan-from-atalanta

Jérémy Jacquet.evidence: joined Liverpool for GBP55m from Rennes | en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_English_football_transfers_summer_2026

Rasmus Hojlund.evidence: outage coverage gap, added from census | en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_English_football_transfers_summer_2026

Bazoumana Toure.evidence: On 5 July 2026, Touré signed for Premier League club Newcastle United on a £42 million transfer fee.

Sandro Tonali.evidence: On 6 July 2026, Tonali signed for Tottenham Hotspur for a transfer fee of £100 million.

Andrey Santos.evidence: On 13 July 2026, Santos joined Manchester United on a five-year contract.

Tyrique George.evidence: On 6 July 2026, he joined Everton on a permanent deal, signing a four-year contract with the club.

Sean Steur.evidence: In July 2026, Steur joined Premier League side Newcastle United on a five-year deal.

Camilo Duran.evidence: On 08 July 2026, he transferred to the Scottish Premiership club Celtic.

Illan Meslier.evidence: On 9 July 2026, Meslier signed for reigning Premier League champions Arsenal, and he was assigned the number 30.

Josh Clarke.evidence: On 7 July 2026, it was announced that Clarke would join EFL League One club Doncaster Rovers on an initial loan, which is expected to become permanent in January 2027, for an undisclosed fee.

Karl Darlow.evidence: On 14 July 2026, Darlow signed for Manchester United on a free transfer, signing a two-year contract.

Cammy Devlin.evidence: On 11 July 2026, Devlin signed for Rangers on a two-year deal, with the option of a further year.

Tom Lockyer.evidence: On 11 July 2026, he joined A-League Men side Melbourne Victory ahead of the 2026–27 season.

Loum Tchaouna.evidence: On 11th July 2026, Tchaouna signed a five-year deal with newly-promoted Coventry City for an undisclosed fee.

Rafiki Said.evidence: On 11 July 2026, Saïd joined EFL Championship Club Wolverhampton Wanderers on a 3 year contract with the option for an extra 12 month extension.

Youri Tielemans.evidence: On 14 July, fellow Premier League club Manchester United signed Tielemans to a five-year contract after activating his release clause.

Lewis Smith.evidence: In July 2026 he transferred to Aberdeen.

Alvaro Rodriguez.evidence: On 14 July 2026, he signed for Premier League club AFC Bournemouth on a long term deal.
